title: stachys germanica var. penicillata
intro: Stachys germanica var. penicillata, also known as German catmint, is a variety of the Stachys germanica plant, belonging to the mint family and native to Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant is known to offer several health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. German catmint can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being.
